body:
## ما الذي يفعله هذا الـ PR / What this does

يرفع Dealix إلى **شركة أنظمة تحوّل (Transformation Systems)** — لكن **بالطريقة المحكومة**: دمج في الكتالوج الموحّد والمعمارية ذات الطبقات الخمس، بدل سايلو منفصل يكسر CI والدكترين.

Elevates Dealix into a Transformation Systems company **the governed way** — integrated into the canonical catalog and 5-plane architecture, not a parallel silo.

### لماذا ليس سكربت الـ silo / Why not the original script
The originally-proposed `transformation_os/` tree (duplicate YAML catalog + standalone proposal generator + flat price list) would have **broken CI** (the `exactly-7` catalog test + `count==7` JSON test), **duplicated the single source of truth** (`registry.py`, Article 11), and **bypassed the 10 doctrine non-negotiables**. This PR delivers the same vision through the existing governed surfaces instead.

## التغييرات / Changes

**Catalog (single source of truth):**
- `ServiceOffering` gains optional setup/monthly range fields + a `"transformation"` journey stage (the 7 core offerings are unchanged).
- 10 Enterprise Transformation OS offerings added → registry **7 → 17**: AI Command Center, WhatsApp Revenue, Brand Intelligence, AI Agent Workforce, Client Experience, Operations Automation, Executive Reporting, Trust & Governance, Growth Engine, Custom Enterprise System. Prices are **estimate ranges** (`is_estimate=True`).
- All 10 wired into `commercial_map` (`_WIRING`/`_OFFER_NOTES`), founder-issued checkout.
- Regenerated `landing/assets/data/services-catalog.json` (count 17).

**Doctrine-safe by construction:**
- No `live_send`/`live_charge`; every offering's `hard_gates` include `no_cold_whatsapp`, `no_scraping`, `no_fake_proof`.
- **Growth Engine OS** is draft-only/approval-gated (no cold outreach, no LinkedIn automation, no blast, no scraping) — verified by a dedicated test.
- No `"guaranteed"/"نضمن"` anywhere (token-scanned).

**Governed, stateless generators** (read prices from the catalog, approval-gated, estimate-stamped, bilingual AR+EN):
- `dealix/commercial/transformation_proposal.py`
- `dealix/commercial/roi_calculator.py`
- `api/routers/commercial.py`: `POST /api/v1/commercial/transformation-proposal/generate(/markdown)`, `POST /api/v1/commercial/roi/estimate`.

**Tests:** count `7→17` in `test_service_catalog` + `test_wave15_customer_journey_e2e`; ladder test scoped to the core funnel; new catalog/proposal/router/ROI tests.

**Docs:** Transformation OS master positioning (AR+EN), 4-front roadmap, and `enterprise_package/` MSA · DPA · ROI worksheet · multi-stakeholder playbook. `no_overclaim` register updated.

## ملاحظات / Notes
- **Service Readiness Matrix intentionally untouched** — it's a decoupled 32-row taxonomy count-locked by its own tests; expanding it is a documented roadmap item.
- **Roadmap (future PRs):** security hardening (existing `scorecard.yml` remediation), enterprise trust pack, proposal/ROI persistence, brand/identity OS.

## التحقق / Verification
- 138 relevant tests pass (catalog, transformation, proposal, ROI, router, doctrine guards, commercial chain, wave15, commercial-map).
- `compileall` across all CI packages: OK. Catalog JSON regenerated & in sync. OpenAPI exports fine (only adds paths). Readiness matrix verifier green & JSON untouched. `ruff` clean (except the pre-existing `exec` S102 pattern shared with `test_service_catalog.py`).
- 2 unrelated pricing failures (`test_checkout_pages` static `pricing.html` CTA; `test_pricing_plans_endpoint` Redis idempotency) were confirmed to **fail identically on clean `main`** — pre-existing, not introduced here.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01276EaqeDNctaRSDnf4Hsjt

…og + governed proposal/ROI engines

Elevate Dealix into a Transformation Systems company the *governed* way —
integrating into the existing 5-plane architecture instead of a parallel silo.

Catalog (single source of truth, Article 11):
- Extend ServiceOffering with optional setup/monthly range fields + a
  "transformation" journey stage (existing 7 offerings unchanged).
- Add 10 Enterprise Transformation OS offerings (registry 7 -> 17): AI Command
  Center, WhatsApp Revenue, Brand Intelligence, AI Agent Workforce, Client
  Experience, Operations Automation, Executive Reporting, Trust & Governance,
  Growth Engine, Custom Enterprise System. Prices are estimate ranges.
- Wire all 10 into commercial_map (_WIRING/_OFFER_NOTES); founder-issued checkout.
- Regenerate landing/assets/data/services-catalog.json (count 17).

Doctrine-safe by construction:
- Every offering: no live_send/live_charge; hard_gates include no_cold_whatsapp,
  no_scraping, no_fake_proof. Growth Engine OS is draft-only/approval-gated
  (no cold outreach, no LinkedIn automation, no blast, no scraping).
- No "guaranteed"/"نضمن" anywhere (token-scanned).

Governed, stateless generators (read prices from catalog, approval-gated,
estimate-stamped, bilingual AR+EN):
- dealix/commercial/transformation_proposal.py
- dealix/commercial/roi_calculator.py
- api/routers/commercial.py: POST transformation-proposal/generate(/markdown),
  POST roi/estimate.

Tests: count 7->17 in service_catalog + wave15; ladder test scoped to the core
funnel; new catalog/proposal/router/ROI tests.

Docs: Transformation OS master positioning (AR+EN), roadmap (4 fronts), and
enterprise_package MSA/DPA/ROI-worksheet/multi-stakeholder playbook. no_overclaim
register updated (canonical_service_catalog -> 17; new transformation_os_catalog).

Service Readiness Matrix intentionally left untouched (decoupled; roadmap item).
